fields.summary: [API] [Navigation][Intelligent-E] Added a new CAN signal of HVbatHeatingStateIcon

comments.body:
Hello [~NBWA2711116] 

I create this ticket to discuss API for the HVbatHeatingStateIcon

Hello [~NBWA2711116] [~TTC01492] 

Can you propose required API for the HVbatHeatingStateIcon?

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] San,

We have created following API No {*}"InfoEV_API_176"{*}, Please find latest attachment "SWD-CCS2EVO-00313-InfoEV_0.27.03.xlsx" in below ticket and let us know in case of any concerns and also confirm API release plan from LG

https://spaws.jp.nissan.biz/jira/browse/CDCFM-8625

Hello [~TTC01509] -san,

This is khanh.hoang.

Thank you for your response.

I see that you defined a getter API for this CRQ.

!image-2025-01-13-13-56-58-232.png|width=792,height=60!

However, according to our LGE Architect, all getter APIs have been deprecated to reduce complexity and IPC messaging between HMI vs FRW, (except getCapability for configuration values).

In this context, we propose using a callback. ex: IPreheatingStateListener.onHvBatHeatingStateIconChange(boolean)

Below is the REQ for using callback instead of getter.

!image-2025-01-13-13-58-12-844.png|width=684,height=220!

For the API release plan, we need to align tasks before confirming. We will notify you as soon as possible.

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] -San,

Thank you for update, For the same updated and attached "SWD-CCS2EVO-00313-InfoEV_0.27.04.xlsx" in below ticket. 
https://spaws.jp.nissan.biz/jira/browse/CDCFM-8625

If any concerns please let us know and also share API release plan

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] -San,

Please confirm LG agreed Label and API release plan

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] -San,

Please confirm the API release plan from LG

Hello [~TTC01509] -san,

This is khanh.hoang.

The release plan needs to be confirmed by HQ and Nissan before filling to ticket.

Currently, we pushed the est plan to HQ.

The next step is processing.

For any update, i'll notify you.

Hi [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] -san,

Next PIP meeting is set from 2:00 pm JST tomorrow.
We must report the plan of all EPIC tickets.
So please follow HQ again.
If you have any points that I can support, please let me know.
Thank you.

[~N206035] san LGE side needs CRQ. could you confirm this point?
CC [~EEL00884] san [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] san
[~LGEJ-LGEJ109] san will share the temporally plan and in paralell [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] san will check with [~LGEJ-LGEJ11] san for CRQ

Hello [~EEL00792] san, [~EEL00884] san

I put the release plan as sprint 3: IRI.25.03.03

Hello [~n199398] san

As CDCFM-6970 EPIC has postponed to PI26, I changed the API release plan

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] San, 

Could you let me know when we will receive the skeleton code or our local implementation?

Regards.

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ109]-san
This EPIC is moved to next  PI so please close it,
